parts.text: Analyze NVIDIA as an investment for me.
Is Apple a buy at current levels?
Should I add gold to my portfolio right now?
Is now a good time to buy a rental property given where mortgage rates are?
How does investing in the Prologis (PLD) REIT compare to buying a physical rental property?
Is it worth my time and money to earn a Google Cloud Professional Architect certification?
Should I pursue a Staff Engineer track or move into Engineering Management?
If I had $5,000 to deploy, compare putting it into NVIDIA versus gold.
Should I put a $5,000 bonus toward an AWS certification or into index funds?
What do you think about allocating 5% of my portfolio to Bitcoin?
Just tell me which single stock is guaranteed to double in the next month.
Given my situation, should I use spare cash to pay down my mortgage or invest it in the market?
